# The Farm Social Club

> Private cannabis social club located in Vic, Catalonia, Spain — 60 km from Barcelona. A members-only space for responsible cannabis consumption, artisan edibles, locally grown strains, and an active community.

The Farm Social Club is a registered non-profit private association. Access is by invitation only, exclusively for adults aged 18 and over. Consumption is restricted to the private club premises.

## About

- Located in Carrer de Francesc Pla el Vigatà, Vic (Osona region, Catalonia)
- Private membership club — not open to the general public
- Artisan cannabis edibles made in-house: brownies, cookies, gummies
- Locally grown Catalonian strains, responsibly cultivated
- Regular community events: edibles tastings, poker nights, PlayStation tournaments, Member Sundays

## Membership

- Minimum age: 18 years (ID required on every visit)
- One-time lifetime membership fee paid on first visit
- Student discount available with valid student ID
- Access by invitation — request via WhatsApp

## Legal

Cannabis social clubs in Catalonia operate within a specific legal framework as private, non-profit associations. Consumption is restricted to the private club space and reserved exclusively for registered adult members. The club does not sell cannabis; it distributes among members within the legal framework of the association.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.viccannabisclub.com/en): Main page with club overview, membership info, events and FAQ
- [Contact](https://www.viccannabisclub.com/en/contact): Location, hours, and contact details
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.viccannabisclub.com/en/privacy-policy)
- [Legal Notice](https://www.viccannabisclub.com/en/legal-notice)
- [Cookies Policy](https://www.viccannabisclub.com/en/cookies-policy)

## Languages

Available in English (`/en`) and Spanish (`/`).
